  • Hide All Code

Independent T-Test: Sex Differences in Lateral Hop Biomechanics

This report examines lateral hopping biomechanics and performance data:

  1. Demographic information (age, sex, height, mass)
  2. Biomechanical angles during landing phase (KFlex, HFlex, TFlex, KFPPA, HFPPA, PD, LTM)
  3. Performance data (hop distances) for four directions: LL, LR, RL, RR

Demographic Data Analysis

Summary Statistics

demo_summary <- demo_data %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    Age_Mean = mean(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
    Age_SD = sd(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mass_Mean = mean(Mass, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mass_SD = sd(Mass, na.rm = TRUE),
    Height_Mean = mean(Height, na.rm = TRUE),
    Height_SD = sd(Height, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

kable(demo_summary, 
      caption = "Overall Demographic Summary", 
      digits = 2,
      col.names = c("N", "Age (M)", "Age (SD)", "Mass (M)", "Mass (SD)", "Height (M)", "Height (SD)")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
Overall Demographic Summary
N Age (M) Age (SD) Mass (M) Mass (SD) Height (M) Height (SD)
40 25.02 3.58 70.66 12.02 170.74 7.8 
demo_by_sex <- demo_data %>%
  group_by(Sex) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    Age_Mean = mean(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
    Age_SD = sd(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mass_Mean = mean(Mass, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mass_SD = sd(Mass, na.rm = TRUE),
    Height_Mean = mean(Height, na.rm = TRUE),
    Height_SD = sd(Height, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

kable(demo_by_sex, 
      caption = "Demographic Summary by Sex", 
      digits = 2,
      col.names = c("Sex", "N", "Age (M)", "Age (SD)", "Mass (M)", "Mass (SD)", "Height (M)", "Height (SD)")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
Demographic Summary by Sex
Sex N Age (M) Age (SD) Mass (M) Mass (SD) Height (M) Height (SD)
F 20 24.15 2.89 62.06 8.71 166.90 6.82
M 20 25.90 4.04 79.26 8.05 174.57 6.88

Demographic Distributions

demo_long <- demo_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Age, Mass, Height), names_to = "Measure", values_to = "Value")

ggplot(demo_long, aes(x = Sex, y = Value, fill = Sex)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~Measure, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Demographic Variables by Sex", x = "", y = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("F" = "#FF9999", "M" = "#99CCFF")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

t_test_results <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("Age", "Mass", "Height"),
  t_value = c(
    t.test(Age ~ Sex, data = demo_data)$statistic,
    t.test(Mass ~ Sex, data = demo_data)$statistic,
    t.test(Height ~ Sex, data = demo_data)$statistic
  ),
  p_value = c(
    t.test(Age ~ Sex, data = demo_data)$p.value,
    t.test(Mass ~ Sex, data = demo_data)$p.value,
    t.test(Height ~ Sex, data = demo_data)$p.value
  )
)

kable(t_test_results, 
      caption = "T-Test Results for Demographics (Male vs Female)", 
      digits = 3,
      col.names = c("Variable", "t-value", "p-value")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
T-Test Results for Demographics (Male vs Female)
Variable t-value p-value
Age -1.576 0.124
Mass -6.484 0.000
Height -3.547 0.001

Biomechanical Angles Analysis

angle_types <- c("KFlex", "HFlex", "Tflex", "KFPPA", "HFPPA", "PD", "LTM")
hop_directions <- c("LL", "LR", "RL", "RR")

angles_long <- angles_data %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^(LL|LR|RL|RR)_"),
    names_to = c("Direction", "Angle"),
    names_pattern = "(.+)_(.+)",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

Descriptive Statistics by Sex

angles_summary <- angles_long %>%
  group_by(Sex, Direction, Angle) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

for(dir in hop_directions) {
  cat(paste("\n###", dir, "Direction\n"))
  
  angles_summary %>%
    filter(Direction == dir) %>%
    select(-Direction) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Sex, values_from = c(Mean, SD)) %>%
    kable(caption = paste("Kinematic Angles for", dir, "Direction"), digits = 2) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
    print()
}

Angle Visualizations

for(angle in angle_types) {
  p <- angles_long %>%
    filter(Angle == angle) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Direction, y = Value, fill = Sex)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = Sex), width = 0.1, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    labs(title = paste(angle, "by Direction and Sex"),
         x = "Hop Direction", y = paste(angle, "(degrees)")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("F" = "#FF9999", "M" = "#99CCFF")) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("F" = "#CC0066", "M" = "#0066CC"))
  
  print(p)
}

T-Tests with Effect Sizes

t_test_angles <- angles_long %>%
  group_by(Direction, Angle) %>%
  nest() %>%
  mutate(
    t_test = map(data, ~t.test(Value ~ Sex, data = .x)),
    statistic = map_dbl(t_test, ~.x$statistic),
    df = map_dbl(t_test, ~.x$parameter),
    p_value = map_dbl(t_test, ~.x$p.value),
    p_signif = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    ),
    effect_size = map(data, ~{
      tryCatch({
        es <- cohen.d(Value ~ Sex, data = .x)
        list(d = es$estimate, ci_lower = es$conf.int[1], ci_upper = es$conf.int[2])
      }, error = function(e) list(d = NA, ci_lower = NA, ci_upper = NA))
    }),
    cohens_d = map_dbl(effect_size, ~.x$d),
    effect_text = ifelse(
      p_value < 0.05,
      sprintf("%.2f", cohens_d),
      ""
    ),
    magnitude = case_when(
      is.na(cohens_d) | p_value >= 0.05 ~ "",
      abs(cohens_d) < 0.2 ~ "Negligible",
      abs(cohens_d) < 0.5 ~ "Small",
      abs(cohens_d) < 0.8 ~ "Medium",
      TRUE ~ "Large"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Direction, Angle, statistic, df, p_value, p_signif, effect_text, magnitude)

kable(t_test_angles, 
      caption = "T-Test Results for Biomechanical Angles (Male vs Female)", 
      digits = 3,
      col.names = c("Direction", "Angle", "t", "df", "p", "Sig", "Cohen's d", "Magnitude")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
T-Test Results for Biomechanical Angles (Male vs Female)
Direction Angle t df p Sig Cohen’s d Magnitude
LL KFlex -0.418 33.814 0.679 ns
LL HFlex -2.859 31.177 0.008 ** -0.93 Large
LL Tflex -2.237 35.963 0.032
-0.73 Medium
LL KFPPA 2.138 34.187 0.040
0.69 Medium
LL HFPPA -2.894 34.936 0.007 ** -0.94 Large
LL PD -1.139 31.696 0.263 ns
LL LTM -0.167 33.117 0.868 ns
LR KFlex -0.203 30.150 0.841 ns
LR HFlex -1.079 34.262 0.288 ns
LR Tflex -1.248 35.895 0.220 ns
LR KFPPA 0.059 35.628 0.953 ns
LR HFPPA -3.807 35.890 0.001 *** -1.24 Large
LR PD -0.513 34.638 0.612 ns
LR LTM 1.649 28.779 0.110 ns
RL KFlex -0.192 30.583 0.849 ns
RL HFlex -1.052 33.855 0.300 ns
RL Tflex -1.309 33.629 0.199 ns
RL KFPPA -0.049 34.285 0.961 ns
RL HFPPA -2.399 35.154 0.022
-0.78 Medium
RL PD -0.811 33.451 0.423 ns
RL LTM -0.135 33.652 0.893 ns
RR KFlex -0.358 33.833 0.723 ns
RR HFlex -3.926 35.640 0.000 *** -1.27 Large
RR Tflex -2.762 35.138 0.009 ** -0.90 Large
RR KFPPA 2.319 29.903 0.027
0.75 Medium
RR HFPPA -3.751 28.987 0.001 *** -1.22 Large
RR PD -1.995 35.855 0.054 ns
RR LTM 0.580 34.747 0.565 ns 
sig_angles <- t_test_angles %>% filter(p_value < 0.05)

if(nrow(sig_angles) > 0) {
  kable(sig_angles,
        caption = "Significant Differences Only", 
        digits = 3,
        col.names = c("Direction", "Angle", "t", "df", "p", "Sig", "Cohen's d", "Magnitude")) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
}
Significant Differences Only
Direction Angle t df p Sig Cohen’s d Magnitude
LL HFlex -2.859 31.177 0.008 ** -0.93 Large
LL Tflex -2.237 35.963 0.032
-0.73 Medium
LL KFPPA 2.138 34.187 0.040
0.69 Medium
LL HFPPA -2.894 34.936 0.007 ** -0.94 Large
LR HFPPA -3.807 35.890 0.001 *** -1.24 Large
RL HFPPA -2.399 35.154 0.022
-0.78 Medium
RR HFlex -3.926 35.640 0.000 *** -1.27 Large
RR Tflex -2.762 35.138 0.009 ** -0.90 Large
RR KFPPA 2.319 29.903 0.027
0.75 Medium
RR HFPPA -3.751 28.987 0.001 *** -1.22 Large

Performance Data Analysis

perf_with_demo <- performance_data %>%
  left_join(demo_data %>% select(ID, Sex), by = "ID")

perf_long <- perf_with_demo %>%
  select(ID, Sex, LR_AVG, LL_AVG, RL_AVG, RR_AVG) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = ends_with("_AVG"), names_to = "Direction", values_to = "Distance") %>%
  mutate(Direction = gsub("_AVG", "", Direction))

Performance by Sex

perf_by_sex <- perf_with_demo %>%
  group_by(Sex) %>%
  summarise(
    LR = sprintf("%.1f (%.1f)", mean(LR_AVG, na.rm = TRUE), sd(LR_AVG, na.rm = TRUE)),
    LL = sprintf("%.1f (%.1f)", mean(LL_AVG, na.rm = TRUE), sd(LL_AVG, na.rm = TRUE)),
    RL = sprintf("%.1f (%.1f)", mean(RL_AVG, na.rm = TRUE), sd(RL_AVG, na.rm = TRUE)),
    RR = sprintf("%.1f (%.1f)", mean(RR_AVG, na.rm = TRUE), sd(RR_AVG, na.rm = TRUE))
  )

kable(perf_by_sex, caption = "Hop Distance by Sex - Mean (SD)") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
Hop Distance by Sex - Mean (SD)
Sex LR LL RL RR
F 154.8 (22.0) 97.6 (22.2) 152.2 (26.2) 102.6 (28.1)
M 172.0 (19.8) 118.3 (21.6) 171.2 (19.3) 123.0 (24.7) 
ggplot(perf_long, aes(x = Direction, y = Distance, fill = Sex)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Sex), width = 0.1, alpha = 0.4) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(title = "Hop Performance by Direction and Sex", x = "Hop Direction", y = "Distance (cm)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("F" = "#FF9999", "M" = "#99CCFF")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("F" = "#CC0066", "M" = "#0066CC"))

t_test_perf <- perf_long %>%
  group_by(Direction) %>%
  t_test(Distance ~ Sex) %>%
  add_significance()

kable(t_test_perf %>% select(Direction, statistic, df, p, p.signif),
      caption = "T-Test Results for Performance (Male vs Female)", 
      digits = 3,
      col.names = c("Direction", "t", "df", "p", "Sig")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
T-Test Results for Performance (Male vs Female)
Direction t df p Sig
LL -2.980 37.972 0.005 **
LR -2.584 37.588 0.014
RL -2.612 34.980 0.013
RR -2.439 37.393 0.020

Height-Normalized Performance

perf_normalized <- perf_with_demo %>%
  mutate(
    LR_Norm = LR_AVG / Height * 100,
    LL_Norm = LL_AVG / Height * 100,
    RL_Norm = RL_AVG / Height * 100,
    RR_Norm = RR_AVG / Height * 100
  )

norm_perf_long <- perf_normalized %>%
  select(ID, Sex, ends_with("_Norm")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = ends_with("_Norm"), names_to = "Direction", values_to = "Distance") %>%
  mutate(Direction = gsub("_Norm", "", Direction))

ggplot(norm_perf_long, aes(x = Direction, y = Distance, fill = Sex)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Sex), width = 0.1, alpha = 0.4) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  labs(title = "Height-Normalized Performance by Sex", x = "Hop Direction", y = "Distance (% of Height)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("F" = "#FF9999", "M" = "#99CCFF")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("F" = "#CC0066", "M" = "#0066CC"))

t_test_norm <- norm_perf_long %>%
  group_by(Direction) %>%
  t_test(Distance ~ Sex) %>%
  add_significance()

kable(t_test_norm %>% select(Direction, statistic, df, p, p.signif),
      caption = "T-Test Results for Normalized Performance (Male vs Female)", 
      digits = 3,
      col.names = c("Direction", "t", "df", "p", "Sig")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
T-Test Results for Normalized Performance (Male vs Female)
Direction t df p Sig
LL -2.284 37.995 0.028
LR -1.408 37.995 0.167 ns
RL -1.531 36.564 0.134 ns
RR -1.793 37.722 0.081 ns

Summary

Demographics: Males and females showed similar age distributions with expected differences in mass and height.

Biomechanical Angles: Several landing kinematic angles showed sex-based differences, particularly in hip and trunk flexion.

Performance: Males demonstrated greater absolute hopping distances, though most differences diminished when normalized for height.
